programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: 20000 Leagues Under the Sea
programme.desc: In the 19th century an expert marine biologist is hired by the government to determine whats sinking ships all over the ocean His daughter follows him They are intercepted by a mysterious captain Nemo and his incredible submarine

programme.title: Grizzly Mountain
programme.desc: Present-day Portland suburbs kids Dylan and Nicole go on the camping trip with their family and when they enter a mysterious cave in the mountains theyre transported back in time to 1870 where they meet mountain man Jeremiah

programme.title: The Dirt Bike Kid
programme.desc: When his mother sends Jack off with money to buy groceries he happens to lay his hands on a dirt bike which has supercharged magic powers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: TBH 215
programme.desc: TBH 215

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas worries Willie may recover David reveals to a disbelieving Burke that Sarah is a ghost Sarah warns David to stay away from the old house

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: The Three Mesquitters
programme.desc: When a group of World War 1 buddies head west to farmstead they run into trouble

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 3 Fractured Fairy Tales Cinderella 2 Peabodys Improbably History Robin Hood Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 4

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Schanke are followed by a crew from a reality television show When Nick is caught vamping vampire enforcers try to kill all who saw

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: The spirit of a dead voodoo priestess strikes out at three voodoo Legbas to get their power and resurrect herself and take revenge on the fourth Legba who killed her

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: To avoid prosecution and to increase the value of his work an artist fakes his own death following the accidental death of one of his models Before long he goes stir crazy cooped in the loft apartment and accuses his wife of having an affair Later two ladies reluctantly agree to let a guy move into their apartment but theyre apprehensive about his intentions - for good reason

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A good natured vampire takes a more novel approach to satisfying his blood lust with his chosen undercover employment

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Eager and unscrupulous tabloid newspaper reporter Jane L will go to any length to score a juicy scoop Jane L gets in way over her head when she goes snooping around a remote rural mansion in search of Billy Baltimore a legendary 60s acid rock guitarist who reportedly died twenty years ago

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: International hit woman Jackie Dresser makes a living traveling all over the world and bumping people off for a substantial fee Complications arise when the lonely and love-starved Jackie falls for hunky fitness instructor Johnnie while on vacation in a foreign country

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick tries to stop drinking blood but falls off the wagon and must fight his urges to go on a murderous spree

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans latest underground contacts are secretly German spies

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Sergeant Schultz impersonates Klink in a scheme to get some of his men free from the Gestapo

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The pilot episode that tells the tale of a tiny ship which set off on a three-hour tour but got caught in a storm and beached on an island The pilot was filmed in November 1963 and not aired until almost 30 years later

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys teach a wealthy couple the joys of simple living

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa thinks hes the life-of-the-party

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS uses Hymie as a robotic assassin against the Chief

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max inherits the position of union negotiator between agents and CONTROL

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and while Bobbie Sue nurses him back to health BJ reminisces about the many beautiful women in his past

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The latest extra-terrestials to be rescued by the Moon Alpha Base crew are Pasc and his young son Etrec They are from the usually peaceful planet of Archaron and they claim that they are victims of a rebellion engineered by Pascs wife Lyra However Helena discovers that they have both been infected with a virus which makes them considerably less friendly and more deadly than their initial claim

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Neeg is killed by a bacteria that is deadly to both Taelons and Humans If it spreads it might be disastrous A new racist group attacks a community center

programme.desc: In the midst of the post apocalyptic future the team decide to throw a birthday party for Debi Meanwhile the Morthren attempt to locate their malfunctioning seeing-eye device a self-controlled drone which has run amok through the city

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A school teacher claims to have killed a bank robber The townspeople want to celebrate their new hero It all starts to unravel as his past catches up with him and the people hes lived with want nothing else to do with him

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A prince the absolute ruler of a principality has 15 million which he plans to use for arms to wage war on a neighboring oil-rich country Briggs devises a scheme that involves breaking the bank of the princes casino First the IMF will utilize a computer to take 200000 at roulette That will provide the stake the IMF needs to take the prince at a high-stakes game of baccarat

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tyler Jackson v. Dmitriy Samoylov

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: The Jaxx Kellerman Interview
programme.desc: Meet this young lady who writes and performs with a real chip on her shoulder Jaxx Kellerman on the Sherard Show

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: On his birthday Mega Man really wishes to become human So he is ready to pass the Three Challenges to accomplish humanity

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root which only responds to Audric or something belonging to him reacts to the Planet Xiang which leads Jayce and Herc there even though it is a planet controlled by Saw Boss They discover a message from Audric on a vase but before they can get it it is stolen Jayce and Herc and Oon are drawn further into the city where Saw Boss has laid a trap for Jayce Jayce and Oon fall into a pit which is slowly being consumed by fire; but Herc Gillian and Flora come to the rescue Safely aboard the Pride they decode the message which is revealed to be too old to be of much use

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian tells the story of Valroth a powerful weapons maker who made living armor to protect his people many years ago But the armor became too powerful and it was all destroyed except for the helmet Jayce seeks the helmet finds it and after putting it on his power is invincible He easily defeats some monster minds But the helmet is wicked and it takes over Jayces body Jayce and the power of light conquer the evil helmet and then they destroy it

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Bruce Sato encounters a man suffering from a fever in the Alaskan snow and is soon infected with the same mysterious disease Matt assembles MASK to find the cure

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Scott and T-Bob find the treasure of Brian Boru at the end of an Irish rainbow but VENOM soon finds out and tries to get it for themselves

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While in Final Fantasy Captain N is jealous of the Prince who is a friend of Princess Lana until a mysterious fairy godfather put Kevin in a spell which Lana Megaman and Kid Icarus must recover both the Prince and Captain N
